questionHtml:
Which compound produces the following 1H NMR spectrum?

[Spectral Database for Organic Compounds, SDBS. SDBS Compounds and Spectral Search. [graph] Available at:
https://sdbs.db.aist.go.jp [Accessed 3 January 2019].]


A.  propanal

B.  propanone

C.  propane

D.  methlypropane
